data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multi-contact ownership on opportunities.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Multi-contact ownership on opportunities', but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple steps that confirm functionalities related to bookings and member management, none of the evidence points to the existence or validation of multi-contact ownership on opportunities. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the existence or validation of multi-contact ownership on opportunities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
